title: Relation between partition coefficient of a weak organic base and properties of solvents
author: Manisha A. Agrawal
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
School of Studies in Chemistry, Pt. Ravishankar Shukla University, Raipur-492 010, India 

  Manuscript received 13 October 1998, revised 19 July 1999. accepted 22 July 1999  

 Some physical parameters of  N -phenyl-2-nitrobenzohydroxamic acid, viz. partition coefficients in various organic solvent-aqueous systems, density, molar volume, solubility parameters, primary medium activity coefficients, free energy of transfer of a solute in solvent and values of 1000 ρ/ M,  have been determined. The partition data are discussed on the basis of Regular Solution Theory. An attempt is made to correlate the values of  K D   for a number of common organic solvents, with some physical parameter characteristics of the solvents.
